headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love Synchrony Financial (SYF)
summary: Over the past six months, Synchrony Financial’s stock price fell to $66.59. Shareholders have lost 12.5% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 4.8%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
